klmWeylInputStatus.label: all-omega KLM/Weyl positivity input
klmWeylInputStatus.reason: The uniform omega bridge proves original Weyl positivity and the hbar=1 KLM positive-type condition for Q_omega for every |omega|<1/2.

bridgeStatementIsolatedStatus.label: exact RH/de Branges bridge statement isolated
bridgeStatementIsolatedStatus.reason: The missing theorem is now isolated: construct an explicit transform from the all-omega KLM/Weyl positive family to an RH-equivalent de Branges/Hermite-Biehler or Laguerre-Polya positivity criterion, then prove the endpoint/closure passage.

klmToDeBrangesTransformStatus.label: KLM-to-de Branges transform
klmToDeBrangesTransformStatus.reason: The shifted-Xi kernel positivity theorem supplies the required positive de Branges kernel family K_{E_omega}.  The detailed augmented closed-cone construction is imported one layer lower.

criticalEndpointClosureStatus.label: critical endpoint and positive-cone closure
criticalEndpointClosureStatus.reason: Entrywise convergence of finite positive semidefinite Gram matrices preserves positivity because the finite PSD cone is closed.  Dense-core closed-form convergence extends this endpoint positivity to the completed form domain.

rhDeBrangesConclusionStatus.label: Riemann hypothesis / de Branges conclusion
rhDeBrangesConclusionStatus.reason: Formal chain closed, conditional on the imported KLM/Weyl and augmented closed-cone bridge certificates.  The endpoint passage uses the diagonal de Branges inequality for every 0<omega<1/2: a nonreal Xi zero in the upper half-plane would force a continuum of shifted zeros, contradicting that Xi is a nonzero entire function; conjugation then excludes lower-half-plane zeros.

provedBridgeTheorem: The all-omega KLM/Weyl positive family transports to the shifted-Xi de Branges kernel through the augmented positive-kernel theorem.
endpointPassageTheorem: Positivity of the shifted-Xi de Branges kernels for every 0<omega<1/2 implies all zeros of Xi(z)=xi(1/2+i z) are real by the zero-descent contradiction.
caution: The formal ledger is closed, but this does not substitute for publication-grade independent verification of the imported KLM/Weyl, augmented repair, and closed-cone bridge certificates.
nextProofTarget: Audit every imported theorem for publication-grade rigor and normalization consistency.
